full_text:
Sun Yu (Zhongyi) 孫瑜 (仲異)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Yu (孫瑜), styledZhongyi (仲異). Sun Jing’s second son and cousin to Sun Quan. Sun Yu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Yu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
